ValidationRule.description: Checks if the entry is valid for Talend
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
OR( AND( ISPICKVAL( InterfaceType__c ,"Account Debtor Upsert"), ISBLANK( Account__c ) ), OR( AND( ISPICKVAL( InterfaceType__c ,"Account Supplier Upsert"), ISBLANK( Account__c ) )), OR( AND( ISPICKVAL( InterfaceType__c ,"Invoice Export"), OR( ISBLANK(Account__c) ) )), OR( AND( ISPICKVAL( InterfaceType__c ,"Cancellation Export"), OR( ISBLANK(Account__c), ISBLANK(DateTimeFrom__c), ISBLANK(DateTimeUntil__c) ) )), OR( AND( ISPICKVAL( InterfaceType__c ,"Staff Hour Export"), OR( ISBLANK(DateTimeFrom__c), ISBLANK(DateTimeUntil__c) )) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Abacus Interface entry is not correct. (ABA003)
